audience_description: School Principals in Eduversal partner schools. Holds ultimate accountability for academic outcomes, instructional quality, operational management, compliance, and the school's relationship with yayasan and Eduversal HQ. New principals are simultaneously enrolled in the 12-month Principal Induction track (handbook-principal-v1.json) — induction-overlay tasks layer on the weekly cadence for first-year principals.

source_inheritance.primary_source_description: The Eduversal Principal Operating Cadence v1.0 — 83 tasks across P1-P8 foci, fully Cambridge + Permendikbud + Permendikdasmen anchored. This file is the authoritative source for Principal weekly tasks.
source_inheritance.this_file_role: Adapter / mapping layer between the cadence file's 8-focus structure (P1-P8) and the weekly-checklist module's week-by-week structure. The seed script reads BOTH this file AND principal-operating-cadence.json, then expands cadence tasks onto the appropriate weeks.
source_inheritance.do_not_duplicate: Tasks defined in principal-operating-cadence.json must NOT be re-defined here. This file references them by id (e.g. T-P1-001) and adds only the week-mapping metadata.

framework_anchors.appraisal_framework: principal_appraisal_framework_v1 (when ratified) — F1 Cadence Compliance, F2 Leadership Observation, F3 Stakeholder 360, F4 Outcome Indicators, F5 Self-Assessment

task_categories: Inherited — P1-P8 from principal-operating-cadence.json. Mapped to weekly-checklist categories C1-C6 below.

cadence_to_week_expansion.description: How the seeder maps cadence tasks (D/W/M/T/A/X) to weeks 1-40.

rules.daily: Lands in weekly_essentials/school_principal — present every week, surfaced as standing items.
rules.monthly: Lands on weeks 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40 (Week 4 of every month).
rules.termly: Lands on weeks 17, 38 (end of Sem-1, end of Sem-2). Some tasks specify exact weeks via specific_timing — those override.
rules.annually: Each annual task has specific_timing in cadence file (e.g. 'May-June') — the seeder maps to the corresponding weeks (e.g. May = W31-32, June = W37-39).
rules.adhoc: Lands in weekly_essentials with adhoc=true flag — UI surfaces only when triggered (not weekly).

week_specific_overrides.description: Cases where the cadence file's specific_timing maps to specific weeks, OR where a task is added beyond the cadence file (Eduversal-network-specific events).

1.comment: Annual Eduversal network strategic alignment workshop — July, lands W1.

4.eduversal_specific: Lead first ALT Dashboard Review for the year — review baseline walkthroughs and Domain Heatmap formation.

5.comment: RKT/RKAS preparation begins May-June for following July — but for schools mid-cycle, W5 is the RKAS implementation review point.

8.eduversal_specific: Cambridge Oct/Nov standard entry deadline — Principal final sign-off of all candidate entries across departments.

10-12.comment: Monthly Cambridge progress review intensifies — Oct/Nov exam window.

14-15.eduversal_specific: EASE I window — Principal oversees administration, ensures protocol compliance, escalates anomalies to HQ.

16-17.comment: End-of-Sem-1 internal moderation and standardisation — Principal-led across departments.
Sem-1 grading integrity audit — Principal reviews 10% sample (Section 9.10).

18.eduversal_specific: Sem-1 close — Principal signs off all reports before issuance to parents. Termly improvement plan addendum filed.

19.comment: Mid-year IPDL review — Principal reviews own IPDL with Academic Director (Eduversal HQ Specialist).

20.eduversal_specific: Mid-year network leadership conference — Principal attends, reports school progress, hears network priorities.

22.comment: Cambridge Oct/Nov results released — Principal leads cross-department analysis, files report to yayasan + HQ.

25.eduversal_specific: Cambridge May/June standard entry deadline — Principal final sign-off.

27-32.eduversal_specific: Semester 2 school appraisal visit window — Principal hosts HQ Specialist visit (paired with Principal Leadership Observation under EPDP).

31-35.comment: Cambridge May/June exam series — daily Principal oversight.

33-35.eduversal_specific: EASE II window — Principal oversees administration.

35.comment: Annual EDS review begins — Principal leads with TPS.

36-37.comment: Annual RKT and RKAS preparation for following year.

38.comment: Termly + annual school improvement plan progress review.
Annual teacher appraisal cycle close — Principal final sign-off.

39.comment: Annual report to yayasan — final preparation and presentation.

39.eduversal_specific: Annual Principal Self-Assessment + 360 cycle close (under EPDP).

40.comment: Annual visi-misi review with leadership team and yayasan.

40.eduversal_specific: Year-end Governance Archive Audit — Principal certifies completeness.

induction_overlay.applies_when: users.induction_status in {pre_arrival, listen, diagnose, act, anchor}

extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.title: Monthly coaching session with HQ Director (Academic)
extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.description: First-year Principal mentees receive monthly 1:1 coaching from the assigned HQ Director (Primary or Secondary). Bring data, dilemmas, and decisions. Mentor must hold an active principal_mentor_endorsement certification (Charter NN3).
evidence_required: Coaching session record in induction_progress collection

extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.title: Weekly induction journal entry
extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.description: Private 3-sentence reflection — visible to your Director-mentor only, NOT to HQ in named form (Charter NN2). What did I learn this week? What surprised me? What will I do differently?

extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.title: Quarterly windowed evaluation
extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.description: End of each induction window (Listen W9, Diagnose W18, Act W30, Anchor W40) — formal evaluation conducted by HQ Director using the principal-observation-rubric.json. Formative-only — feeds coaching, NOT appraisal (NN1).
evidence_required: Observation record in induction_observations collection with type: principal_window_evaluation

extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.title: Weekly mood pulse
extra_recurring_tasks_first_year.description: 1-5 score on how the week felt as a Principal. Two consecutive weeks at score ≤2 triggers a check-in from your Director-mentor (the alarm is disclosed to mentee at the start — formative-first).

writes_to: principal_observations/{obsId} — when conducting leadership-paired observations during HQ Specialist visits
principal_coaching_sessions/{sessionId} — when leading own coaching of department leaders
feeds_into: principal_appraisal v1 F1 (Cadence Compliance) — direct evidence
principal_appraisal v1 F2 (Leadership Observation) — when paired with HQ Specialist visit

provenance.primary_source: Academic Hub/resources/principal-operating-cadence.json (1529 lines, 83 tasks, P1-P8 foci) — Eduversal Office of the Academic Director, v1.0, effective 2026-07-01
provenance.rubric_source: Academic Hub/resources/principal-observation-rubric.json — Eduversal Office of the Academic Director, v1.0, effective 2026-07-01
provenance.operational_pattern_source: Adapted from Semesta School Academic Leadership Governance Handbook 2026-2027 (Section 2.2 Principal Role; Section 12 Annual Governance Calendar) with Eduversal-network adjustments
